sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, str_value VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str_value) VALUES (1, '   Hello World   ');
UPDATE test_strings SET str_value = rtrim(str_value) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, rtrim(str_value) AS trimmed_value FROM test_strings;
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE rtrim(str_value) = 'Hello World';
